message:
feat: add delegation tree reconstruction to load-transcript overview mode

Add buildSubtree helper that recursively reads child agent log files to
reconstruct the full delegation tree. Each node includes agent_name,
handle_id, child_id, success, turns, duration_ms, and children array.

- Reads child logs at {childLogsDir}/{handle_id}.jsonl
- Parses act_start/act_end events in child logs for sub-delegations
- Recurses up to depth 5
- Gracefully handles missing child log files (empty children array)

Tests added:
- flat delegations with no sub-delegations
- nested delegation tree (root→A→B)
- graceful handling when child log is missing
